title: Board permission for subitems
excerpt:
Currenty board permission does not applied for subitems, what we need is member who is assgined for a subitem, just that member can edit tha subitem. 
could you upgrade permissions so it recognises people on subitems too…

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currenty board permission does not applied for subitems, what we need is member who is assgined for a subitem, just that member can edit tha subitem.

could you upgrade permissions so it recognises people on subitems too!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kmk - this is now possible with this new functionality being rolled out.

image1151×645 58 KB

If you don’t have it available in your monday yet you can contact support@monday.com to have it added.

Thanks!

posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, I missed unselected item people to leave subitem permission as keys.
